$comment: Generated by `ratchet index` from file content - the routing index for this knowledge library.
name: cqrs

entries.title: CQRS CommandBus + CommandHandler
entries.summary: Send a command to its single handler: CommandBus.Send(ctx, cmd) marshals and publishes the command; a CommandHandler[Cmd] handles exactly one command type. One command -> one handler. Keywords: waterm

entries.title: CQRS EventBus + EventHandler
entries.summary: Publish an event to all interested handlers: EventBus.Publish(ctx, event) marshals and publishes; EventHandler[Event] subscribes. One event -> many handlers (fan-out / pub-sub). Keywords: watermill cq

entries.title: CQRS command/event marshaler
entries.summary: CommandEventMarshaler encodes/decodes commands and events to and from message payloads (JSON or protobuf), and derives the topic/name from the struct type. Keywords: watermill cqrs marshaler marshal u

entries.title: CQRS component: overview and wiring
entries.summary: The CQRS facade over watermill: wires a CommandBus, EventBus, CommandProcessor and EventProcessor on top of a Publisher/Subscriber + Router with a marshaler - so you write command/event handlers, not

entries.title: CQRS Command/Event processors
entries.summary: CommandProcessor and EventProcessor subscribe to the command/event topics and dispatch incoming messages to the registered handlers inside the Router (with its middleware/retries). They are the consum

entries.title: In-memory Go-channel Pub/Sub
entries.summary: A Publisher+Subscriber backed by Go channels - no external broker, for tests, examples, and single-process event-driven code. Drop-in for any Publisher/Subscriber. Keywords: watermill gochannel in-mem

entries.title: Watermill Message (the event/command envelope)
entries.summary: The unit passed through watermill pub/sub: Message has a UUID, Payload []byte, and Metadata (string map); consumers call Ack() to confirm or Nack() to redeliver. Keywords: watermill message payload me

entries.title: Publisher and Subscriber interfaces

entries.title: Router resilience middleware

entries.title: Message Router (subscribe -> handler -> publish engine)
